title: 3Powers risk tiers (risk-tiers.yaml)
description: The single source of truth for every gate threshold. A gate is never satisfied by weakening a threshold here; raise a change's tier instead.

tiers.description: Tier name -> its thresholds and gate set.

model_diversity.description: Whether oracle/coder model diversity is required.

diff_mutation.description: Opt-in: run mutation over changed files when a --base is given.

required_layers.description: Test layers required per requirement (e.g. unit, integration, e2e).

gates.description: The gate names that run at this tier, cheapest-first.

capabilities.description: Capability area -> the tier name it is held to.
